message:
feat(patterns): support user pattern packs with custom namespace prefixes

Enable users to define their own pattern packs loaded from a configurable
directory (~/.config/wa/patterns/ by default), with relaxed validation
that allows custom rule ID prefixes while still enforcing dot-separated
namespacing (e.g., myorg.my_rule).

config.rs:
- Add user_packs_enabled (default true) and user_packs_dir fields to PatternsConfig
- Add resolved_user_packs_dir() with tilde expansion and fallback

patterns.rs:
- Split RuleDef::validate() into validate() and validate_user_pack()
- Add PatternPack::validate_as_user_pack() with relaxed prefix rules
- Add PatternLibrary::new_with_user_packs() accepting user pack names

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
